heading: Today
text: Sunshine, mixing with some mid and high-level clouds midday and afternoon.  Quite warm.  Highs in the 80s, approaching 90 in the warmer valleys.  Light winds, becoming west to southwest near 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mainly clear this evening with a few clouds, then mixing with periods of clouds overnight.  Lows in the 50s, some low 60s near Lake Champlain.  Winds diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Friday
text: A mix of clouds and sun.  More clouds from the Adirondacks and Rt. 4 north during the afternoon.  Highs in the upper 70s to low 80s north, in the 80s in the Champlain Valley and south.  Light, variable winds, becoming west to southwest near 10 mph.
